hyperedges.label: Pundit policy hierarchy (deny-by-default to authenticated to ownership)

CI pipeline composed of rubocop, bundler-audit, importmap audit, brakeman
Rails entrypoint chain: bin/rails -> boot -> application -> environment
Test support modules included into ActiveSupport::TestCase
